title: Tracer Origin
description: An Origin allowing the player to play as Tracer from Overwatch.
body:
# Tracer
Desyncronized from the normal flow of reality, you can accelerate or reverse your own time.

### 💫 Blink
Briefly speed up your time, nearly teleporting to where you would go.

### ⌛Recall
Rewind your health and position to about three seconds in the past, clearing all effects.

### 🏹 Pulsebows
Dual wield crossbows to load a volley of 40 bolts.
Reloads automatically with enough arrows.

### 💔 Glass
Because of your build, you have 7 hearts and move a little quicker.

### 🧪 Unstable
Negative effects last longer/positive effects are shortened (20%)

Pack tested in 1.20.1+

Requires Pehkui
